Iran/USA/Israel War 2026 — Daily Chronicle Last updated: 2026-03-06 | Sources: Reuters, AP, BBC, Al Jazeera, NBC, Wikipedia QA-Review: Opus (2026-03-06)
Daily Overview Day Date Main Event Hormuz Status Strategic Index 1 2026-02-28 USA/Israel begin airstrikes on Iran Open 6/10 2 2026-03-01 Iran fires first missile/drone waves Tense 7/10 3 2026-03-02 Attacks on US bases in Azerbaijan/Qatar Partial Blockade 7/10 4 2026-03-03 Beirut bombarded, Hezbollah active Partial Blockade 8/10 5 2026-03-04 500+ missiles, 2,000+ drones cumulative Partial Blockade 8/10 6 2026-03-05 USA sinks Iranian warship Critical 9/10 7 2026-03-06 Iran rejects negotiations; Trump wants to determine Iran’s leader Critical 9/10 Detailed Chronicle Day 1 — February 28, 2026 Category Details Military USA + Israel launch coordinated airstrikes on IRGC, missile depots, nuclear infrastructure Iran Mobilization; first drone shootdowns Diplomacy UN Security Council meets — no agreement (Russia/China veto) Economy Oil price +8%, Bitcoin -5% Russia Observing, no movements Day 2 — March 1, 2026 Category Details Military First ballistic missiles on US bases; Iron Dome/Arrow active USA CENTCOM: 50,000 soldiers, 200 aircraft, 2 carriers (Gerald R. Ford + Eisenhower) Proxies Hezbollah missile fire on Northern Israel Cyber Attacks on Israeli + US infrastructure (energy, communication) Day 3 — March 2, 2026 Category Details Military Iran attacks US bases in Azerbaijan and Qatar Casualties 6 US soldiers killed Regional Airspace disruption over entire Gulf region Iran Internal First reports of unrest in Tehran (People vs. Regime) Day 4 — March 3, 2026 Category Details Beirut Israeli strikes on southern suburbs (Hezbollah infrastructure) Casualties Iran 1,230+ dead; Israel 11; Gulf states 9+ US Senate War Powers Resolution rejected — war legitimacy remains Oil Price Brent >$120/barrel Day 5 — March 4, 2026 Category Details Balance 500+ ballistic missiles + ~2,000 drones (40% Israel, 60% US targets) IRGC Confirms attacks on Nakhchivan Trump “24/7 strikes — seabed to space and cyberspace” Economy Bitcoin -15% war-related; Gold +12% Day 6 — March 5, 2026 Category Details Key Event USA sinks Iranian warship in the Persian Gulf Iran Retaliation announced Trump Rejects Khamenei’s son as successor; wants to have a say Beirut Further airstrikes on southern suburbs Damascus Still intact Day 7 — March 6, 2026 Category Details Iran FM Araghchi: “No ceasefire, no negotiations” Targets Military academies + infrastructure in Iran hit Trump Wants to personally help determine Iran’s next Supreme Leader Economy Bitcoin ~$71,200; Brent ~$125; Gold ~$3,200 Russia No troop movements — observing (Suwalki Gap quiet) Prophetic Contextualization Prophet/Source Period Prophecy Status Ezekiel 38 ~590 BC Persia (Iran) in coalition against Israel — Gog/Magog war follows afterward 🟡 Active (Phase 1) Daniel 8 ~550 BC Ram (Iran) completely shattered by the male goat (West) 🟡 In progress Jeremiah 49 ~600 BC “Bow of Elam broken” = missile capability/Bushehr destroyed 🟡 In progress Isaiah 17 ~740 BC Damascus becomes a heap of ruins — still intact 🔴 Pending Irlmaier 1950s Middle East = prelude; spark = assassination of “third” in the Balkans 🔍 Monitor Stormberger 18th century Three army columns from the East, war lasts only days 🔵 Phase 3 Mühlhiasl 18th century “When it starts, it goes blow after blow” 🔵 Phase 3 Fatima 1917 Russia spreads errors; Third World War 🔵 Phase 3 Nostradamus 16th century “King of terror from the East”; battles in the Mediterranean 🟡 In progress Baba Vanga 1996 2026: “Great weapon/explosion” (speculative, hard to verify) 🔍 Monitor Revelation 16 ~90 AD Euphrates/Armageddon — final phase, not now ⚫ Final phase Prophetic Priority List 🔴 CRITICAL — Imminent Damascus a heap of ruins (Isaiah 17) As soon as Israel levels Damascus, the escalation level to Russia is reached. Daily monitoring required.
🔍 WATCHPOINT — The “Third” (Irlmaier) As long as no high-ranking politician/peacemaker is murdered at a conference (Balkans/Budapest), the war remains regional. This murder is Irlmaier’s trigger for the invasion of Europe.
🔵 MEDIUM-TERM — Russian Troop Movements According to all European prophets, Russia strikes when the West is distracted in the Middle East. Daily check: Suwalki Gap, Belarus, northern flank.
What Comes Next According to Prophecy 🔴 Damascus destroyed (Isaiah 17) — imminent 🟡 Iran loses offensive power completely (Jeremiah 49, Daniel 8) 🟡 Israel deems itself secure (Ezekiel 38:11) — after the war, brief quiet 🔵 Assassination of “third” (Irlmaier) — trigger for Europe 🔵 Russia + Turkey mobilize (Gog coalition, Ezekiel 38) 🔵 Russia attacks Europe (Irlmaier, Stormberger, Mühlhiasl) — Summer? ⚫ Armageddon (Revelation 16) — final phase Daily Update Checklist Oil price (Brent/WTI) — Panic indicator Gold price — Flight to hard assets Bitcoin — Risk appetite Damascus: Status intact/damaged/destroyed Russian troop movements (Suwalki Gap, Belarus, Ukraine northern flank) US carrier positions (Gerald R. Ford, Eisenhower) New casualties Negotiation offers (yes/no) Internal unrest in Iran Hormuz status
summary:
Iran/USA/Israel War 2026 — Daily Chronicle

Last updated: 2026-03-06 | Sources: Reuters, AP, BBC, Al Jazeera, NBC, Wikipedia QA-Review: Opus (2026-03-06)

Daily Overview

Day Date Main Event Hormuz Status Strategic Index
1 2026-02-28 USA/Israel begin airstrikes on Iran Open 6/10
2 2026-03-01 Iran fires first missile/drone waves Tense 7/10
3 2026-03-02 Attacks on US bases in Azerbaijan/Qatar Partial Blockade 7/10
4 2026-03-03 Beirut bombarded, Hezbollah active Partial Blockade 8/10
5 2026-03-04 500+ missiles, 2,000+ drones cumulative Partial Blockade 8/10
6 2026-03-05 USA sinks Iranian warship Critical 9/10
7 2026-03-06 Iran rejects negotiations; Trump wants to determine Iran’s leader Critical 9/10

Detailed Chronicle

Day 1 — February 28, 2026

Category Details
Military USA + Israel launch coordinated airstrikes on IRGC, missile depots, nuclear infrastructure
Iran Mobilization; first drone shootdowns
Diplomacy UN Security Council meets — no agreement (Russia/China veto)
Economy Oil price +8%, Bitcoin -5%
Russia Observing, no movements

Day 2 — March 1, 2026

Category Details
Military First ballistic missiles on US bases; Iron Dome/Arrow active
USA CENTCOM: 50,000 soldiers, 200 aircraft, 2 carriers (Gerald R. Ford + Eisenhower)
Proxies Hezbollah missile fire on Northern Israel
Cyber Attacks on Israeli + US infrastructure (energy, communication)

Day 3 — March 2, 2026

Category Details
Military Iran attacks US bases in Azerbaijan and Qatar
Casualties 6 US soldiers killed
Regional Airspace disruption over entire Gulf region
Iran Internal First reports of unrest in Tehran (People vs. Regime)

Day 4 — March 3, 2026

Category Details
Beirut Israeli strikes on southern suburbs (Hezbollah infrastructure)
Casualties Iran 1,230+ dead; Israel 11; Gulf states 9+
US Senate War Powers Resolution rejected — war legitimacy remains
Oil Price Brent >$120/barrel

Day 5 — March 4, 2026

Category Details
Balance 500+ ballistic missiles + ~2,000 drones (40% Israel, 60% US targets)
IRGC Confirms attacks on Nakhchivan
Trump “24/7 strikes — seabed to space and cyberspace”
Economy Bitcoin -15% war-related; Gold +12%

Day 6 — March 5, 2026

Category Details
Key Event USA sinks Iranian warship in the Persian Gulf
Iran Retaliation announced
Trump Rejects Khamenei’s son as successor; wants to have a say
Beirut Further airstrikes on southern suburbs
Damascus Still intact

Day 7 — March 6, 2026

Category Details
Iran FM Araghchi: “No ceasefire, no negotiations”
Targets Military academies + infrastructure in Iran hit
Trump Wants to personally help determine Iran’s next Supreme Leader
Economy Bitcoin ~$71,200; Brent ~$125; Gold ~$3,200
Russia No troop movements — observing (Suwalki Gap quiet)

Prophetic Contextualization

Prophet/Source Period Prophecy Status
Ezekiel 38 ~590 BC Persia (Iran) in coalition against Israel — Gog/Magog war follows afterward 🟡 Active (Phase 1)
Daniel 8 ~550 BC Ram (Iran) completely shattered by the male goat (West) 🟡 In progress
Jeremiah 49 ~600 BC “Bow of Elam broken” = missile capability/Bushehr destroyed 🟡 In progress
Isaiah 17 ~740 BC Damascus becomes a heap of ruins — still intact 🔴 Pending
Irlmaier 1950s Middle East = prelude; spark = assassination of “third” in the Balkans 🔍 Monitor
Stormberger 18th century Three army columns from the East, war lasts only days 🔵 Phase 3
Mühlhiasl 18th century “When it starts, it goes blow after blow” 🔵 Phase 3
Fatima 1917 Russia spreads errors; Third World War 🔵 Phase 3
Nostradamus 16th century “King of terror from the East”; battles in the Mediterranean 🟡 In progress
Baba Vanga 1996 2026: “Great weapon/explosion” (speculative, hard to verify) 🔍 Monitor
Revelation 16 ~90 AD Euphrates/Armageddon — final phase, not now ⚫ Final phase

Prophetic Priority List

🔴 CRITICAL — Imminent

Damascus a heap of ruins (Isaiah 17) As soon as Israel levels Damascus, the escalation level to Russia is reached. Daily monitoring required.
title: Days 1–7: Chronicle of the Iran/USA/Israel War
